nodes.label: P1–P4
nodes.title: Primitives
nodes.summary: Z, mediant (a+c)/(b+d), fixed point x = f(x), parabola x² + μ = 0. The four irreducible primitives of the framework.

nodes.label: A1
nodes.title: Klein bottle topology
nodes.summary: (q₂, q₃) = (2, 3). XOR filter on non-orientable S¹ × S¹ from P1+P3.

nodes.label: A2
nodes.title: Stern-Brocot bracket
nodes.summary: w_bracket(n) = 1/(F_{n+1} · F_{n+2}) → 1/(φ q²). Binet asymptotic. From mediant primitive P3.

nodes.label: A3
nodes.title: σ²_kernel = 1/4
nodes.summary: Kernel normalization per coupling direction. Derived from ADM Gauss-Codazzi: requires Hamiltonian 16πG + momentum 8πG simultaneously.

nodes.label: A4
nodes.title: Arnold tongue at K=1
nodes.summary: w_tongue(p/q) = σ²_kernel/q² at critical coupling. Standard circle map result; cross-verified by test_tongue_to_bracket_ratio_is_4_over_phi.

nodes.label: A5
nodes.title: λ_unlock closed form
nodes.summary: λ_unlock(K=1) = (4G − π ln 2)/π ≈ 0.473096 where G = Catalan's constant. Integration by parts + ∫₀^{π/4} ln cos u du = G/2 − (π/4) ln 2.

nodes.label: A6
nodes.title: SB diffusion fixed point
nodes.summary: D_eff = D₀/(1 − φ⁻⁴) from Fibonacci-RG convergence sum. Each level contributes φ⁻⁴; geometric series.

nodes.label: A7
nodes.title: Madelung relation
nodes.summary: ℏ = 2 m · D_eff. Identification of the Kuramoto K<1 linearization with the Schrödinger equation; PROOF_B Q4.

nodes.label: A8
nodes.title: Canonical scalar R = √m δθ
nodes.summary: Canonical-action gauge of the linearized Lagrangian. The unique normalization that treats the kinetic coefficient as 1/2.

nodes.label: A9
nodes.title: CMB pivot q = F₂₁
nodes.summary: Pivot identification at Fibonacci index 21. From rate = (1 − n_s)/ln(φ²) and N_efolds = √5/rate = 61.3.

nodes.label: L1
nodes.title: Field-theoretic mass
nodes.summary: m/m_P = (1 − φ⁻⁴)/λ_unlock ≈ 1.806. Combines A6 + A7 (Madelung at the SB fixed point) with A5 supplying λ numerically.

nodes.label: L2
nodes.title: Per-bracket variance
nodes.summary: ⟨δθ²⟩_bracket = σ²_kernel · w_bracket = 1/(4 φ q²). Kernel variance times bracket width.

nodes.label: L3
nodes.title: Canonical variance
nodes.summary: ⟨R²⟩_bracket = m · ⟨δθ²⟩_bracket = m/(4 φ q²). From canonical-gauge L1 + L2.

nodes.label: T
nodes.title: Theorem
nodes.summary: A_s = (1 − φ⁻⁴) / (4 λ_unlock · φ · q_pivot²). The assembled geometric prediction.

nodes.label: C
nodes.title: Corollary (numerical)
nodes.summary: A_s_predicted = 2.33 × 10⁻⁹. Substitutes q_pivot = F_21 = 10946 and numerical values of φ, λ_unlock.

nodes.label: O
nodes.title: Observation
nodes.summary: Planck 2018: A_s = (2.10 ± 0.03) × 10⁻⁹. External input to the comparison, not the derivation.

nodes.label: G1
nodes.title: Gap: horizon-crossing amplification
nodes.summary: Largest structural gap. L2+L3 compute the static zero-point fluctuation at K=1; A_s is the inflation-amplified curvature perturbation at horizon crossing. The de Sitter amplification factor is not in the proof.

nodes.label: G2
nodes.title: Gap: sound speed × slow-roll
nodes.summary: Canonical inflation: A_s ∝ 1/(ε · c_s). Framework has c_s = √(σ²_kernel/m) = 0.372 and a tilt n_s; neither appears in theorem T.

nodes.label: G3
nodes.title: Gap: δθ⁴ correction to tongue
nodes.summary: A4 uses the leading-order Arnold tongue. δθ⁴ cos-expansion terms are O(1) at K=1 and shift the tongue width. Not currently included.

nodes.label: G4
nodes.title: Gap: r* finite-N
nodes.summary: Proof uses r* = 1 at K = 1. Actual r*(K=1) has finite-N corrections ~1/log N from the order parameter self-consistency.

nodes.label: G5
nodes.title: Gap: sub-bracket mode summation
nodes.summary: L2 treats the pivot bracket as one mode. The bracket contains infinitely many sub-rationals (Stern-Brocot sub-tree). Per-bracket variance may be a sum, not a single term.
